title: Not A Band Presents Theme A Geddon
description: Not A Band return to the Brighton Fringe with their latest show " Theme-A-Geddon!" A joyous celebration of the golden age of 80's and 90's TV and Film Theme tunes, played live by a four piece band. Expect Knightrider, The A Team, Baywatch, Only Fools and Horses, Dangerzone and many many more. With costume changes, live visuals and lots of silliness, this isn't just a band, it's Not A Band! With special Fringe guests and surprises, this is a show not to be missed for any fan of 80's and 90's pop culture. "Possibly the greatest band ever" - Geoff Barrow (Portishead) "Brilliant, book em!" - Sean Williamson (Barry, Eastenders)
